title: Loeseliastrum depressum
taxonomy: Loeseliastrum depressum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Loeseliastrum, which is a group of annual or perennial herbs native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The genus Loeseliastrum is further classified under the family Polemoniaceae, which is a small family of flowering plants commonly known as the phlox or gilia family. Members of the genus Loeseliastrum are typically characterized by their showy flowers and hairy leaves. Loeseliastrum depressum is often found in dry, sandy areas and is known for its small, yellow flowers.
